from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler
import json

class H(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def log_message(self, *a): pass
    def do_GET(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type','application/json')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(json.dumps({'status':'ok'}).encode())

s = HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1',8765), H)
import threading
t = threading.Thread(target=s.serve_forever, daemon=True)
t.start()

import urllib.request
r = urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8765/', timeout=3)
print('Status:', r.read().decode())
s.shutdown()
"", "timeout": 10}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@color/background_dark">

    <!-- Search Bar -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:padding="8dp"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="24dp"
            android:layout_height="24dp"
            android:layout_margin="12dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/searchInput"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:hint="Search YouTube"
            android:textColor="@color/text_primary"
            android:textColorHint="@color/text_hint"
            android:background="@drawable/input_background"
            android:padding="10dp"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:singleLine="true"
            android:imeOptions="actionSearch"
            android:inputType="textUri" />

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/voiceBtn"
            android:layout_width="40dp"
            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_btn_speak_now"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:tint="@color/text_secondary"
            android:visibility="gone" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- Chip Categories -->
    <HorizontalScrollView
        android:id="@+id/chipScroll"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        android:background="@color/surface">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/chipContainer"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:padding="8dp"
            android:orientation="horizontal" />
    </HorizontalScrollView>

    <!-- Content Area (WebView + Video List) -->
    <FrameLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1">

        <!-- Video List View -->
        <ListView
            android:id="@+id/videoList"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:divider="@color/divider"
            android:dividerHeight="1dp"
            android:background="@color/background_dark"
            android:visibility="visible" />

        <!-- WebView for actual YouTube playback -->
        <WebView
            android:id="@+id/webView"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:visibility="gone" />

        <!-- Fullscreen Container -->
        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/fullscreenContainer"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:background="#000000" />
    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- Mini Player (shown when video playing in background) -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/miniPlayer"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:background="@color/surface_light"
        android:visibility="gone"
        android:padding="4dp">

        <View
            android:layout_width="48dp"
            android:layout_height="48dp"
            android:background="@color/red_accent" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="8dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/miniTitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"

        <ImageButton

            android:layout_height="40dp"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_close_clear_cancel"

            android:tint="@color/text_secondary" />

    <!-- Bottom Navigation -->

        android:orientation="horizontal"

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
# Manual APK build script for Termux

D8=$BT/d8
ZIPALIGN=$BT/zipalign

PROJ=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent/workspace

# Android framework jar
FW=$SDK/platforms/android-34/android.jar

# Dependencies (from gradle cache)
GRADLE_CACHE=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/.gradle/caches
DEPS=$(find $GRADLE_CACHE -name "*.jar" -path "*/gson*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
ANDROIDX=$(find $GRADLE_CACHE -name "*.jar" -path "*/appcompat*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
MATERIAL=$(find $GRADLE_CACHE -name "*.jar" -path "*/material*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

# Also include extracted AAR classes
AAR_CLASSES=""
for dir in $(find $GRADLE_CACHE -name "jars" -path "*/transforms*" 2>/dev/null | head -5); do
    JAR=$(find "$dir" -name "classes.jar" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    if [ -n "$JAR" ]; then
        AAR_CLASSES="$AAR_CLASSES:$JAR"
    fi
done

CLASSPATH="$FW:$DEPS:$ANDROIDX:$MATERIAL:$AAR_CLASSES"

echo "=== 1. Compile resources ==="
$AAPT2 compile --dir $PROJ/app/src/main/res -o $PROJ/build/manual/res.zip

echo "=== 2. Link resources ==="
$AAPT2 link \
    -o $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk \
    --manifest $PROJ/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml \
    -I $FW \
    --java $PROJ/build/manual/gen \
    -R $PROJ/build/manual/res.zip \
    --min-sdk-version 28 \
    --target-sdk-version 34

echo "=== 3. Compile Java ==="
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/obj
JAVA_FILES=$(find $PROJ/app/src/main/java -name "*.java")
GEN_FILES=$(find $PROJ/build/manual/gen -name "*.java" 2>/dev/null)

javac -source 17 -target 17 \
    -cp "$CLASSPATH" \
    -d $PROJ/build/manual/obj \
    $JAVA_FILES $GEN_FILES 2>&1

echo "=== 4. Dex ==="
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/dex
# Collect all class files + dependency jars
ALL_JARS=""
for j in $(echo $DEPS $ANDROIDX $MATERIAL | tr ':' ' '); do
    if [ -f "$j" ]; then ALL_JARS="$ALL_JARS $j"; fi
done

# Use d8 to dex
java -cp $D8/lib/d8.jar com.android.tools.r8.D8 \
    --output $PROJ/build/manual/dex \
    --lib $FW \
    --min-api 28 \
    $(find $PROJ/build/manual/obj -name "*.class") \
    $ALL_JARS 2>&1 || {
        echo "d8 failed, trying alternative..."
        # Fallback: just dex our classes
        java -cp $D8/lib/d8.jar com.android.tools.r8.D8 \
            --output $PROJ/build/manual/dex \
            --lib $FW \
            --min-api 28 \
            $(find $PROJ/build/manual/obj -name "*.class") 2>&1
    }

echo "=== 5. Build unsigned APK ==="
cp $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk
cd $PROJ/build/manual
zip -j unsigned.apk dex/classes.dex
cd $PROJ

echo "=== 6. Align ==="
$ZIPALIGN -f 4 $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk

echo "=== 7. Sign ==="
KEYSTORE=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/.android/debug.keystore
if [ ! -f "$KEYSTORE" ]; then
    echo "Creating debug keystore..."
    keytool -genkey -v -keystore $KEYSTORE \
        -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android \
        -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 \
        -dname "CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US" 2>/dev/null
fi

$APKSIGNER sign \
    --ks $KEYSTORE \
    --ks-pass pass:android \
    --key-pass pass:android \
    --out $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk \
    $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk

echo "=== DONE ==="
ls -la $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk
", "path": "build_apk.sh"}

function.name: write_file
function.arguments:
{"content": "#!/bin/bash
# Manual APK build - native Termux
set -e

SDK=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/android-sdk
AAPT2=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/aapt2
PROJ=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent/workspace
FW=$SDK/platforms/android-34/android.jar
GSON=$(find /data/data/com.termux/files/home/.gradle/caches -name "gson-2.10.1.jar" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

echo "=== 1. Compile resources ==="
RESOUT=$PROJ/build/manual/compiled_res
rm -rf $RESOUT
mkdir -p $RESOUT
$AAPT2 compile --dir $PROJ/app/src/main/res -o $RESOUT
RES_FLATS=$(find $RESOUT -name "*.flat" | tr '\n' ' ')

echo "=== 2. Link resources ==="
$AAPT2 link \
    -o $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk \
    --manifest $PROJ/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml \
    -I $FW \
    --java $PROJ/build/manual/gen \
    --min-sdk-version 28 \
    --target-sdk-version 34 \
    $RES_FLATS

echo "=== 3. Compile Java ==="
rm -rf $PROJ/build/manual/obj
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/obj
JAVA_FILES=$(find $PROJ/app/src/main/java -name "*.java")
GEN_FILES=$(find $PROJ/build/manual/gen -name "*.java" 2>/dev/null)

javac -source 17 -target 17 \
    -cp "$FW:$GSON" \
    -d $PROJ/build/manual/obj \
    $JAVA_FILES $GEN_FILES 2>&1

echo "=== 4. Dex ==="
rm -rf $PROJ/build/manual/dex
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/dex

java -cp $SDK/build-tools/34.0.0/lib/d8.jar com.android.tools.r8.D8 \
    --output $PROJ/build/manual/dex \
    --lib $FW \
    --min-api 28 \
    $(find $PROJ/build/manual/obj -name "*.class") \
    $GSON 2>&1

echo "=== 5. Build APK ==="
cp $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk
cd $PROJ/build/manual
zip -j unsigned.apk dex/classes.dex
cd $PROJ

echo "=== 6. Sign ==="
KEYSTORE=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/.android/debug.keystore
if [ ! -f "$KEYSTORE" ]; then
    echo "Creating debug keystore..."
    keytool -genkey -v -keystore $KEYSTORE \
        -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android \
        -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 \
        -dname "CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US" 2>/dev/null
fi

java -jar $SDK/build-tools/34.0.0/lib/apksigner.jar sign \
    --ks $KEYSTORE \
    --ks-pass pass:android \
    --key-pass pass:android \
    --out $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk \
    $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk

echo "=== DONE ==="
ls -la $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk
", "path": "build_apk.sh"}

#!/bin/bash
# Manual APK build - native Termux
set -e

D8_JAR=$SDK/cmdline-tools/latest/lib/r8.jar
AAPT2=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/aapt2
PROJ=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent/workspace
FW=$SDK/platforms/android-34/android.jar
GSON=$(find /data/data/com.termux/files/home/.gradle/caches -name "gson-2.10.1.jar" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

echo "=== 1. Compile resources ==="
RESOUT=$PROJ/build/manual/compiled_res
rm -rf $RESOUT
mkdir -p $RESOUT
$AAPT2 compile --dir $PROJ/app/src/main/res -o $RESOUT
RES_FLATS=$(find $RESOUT -name "*.flat" | tr '\n' ' ')

echo "=== 2. Link resources ==="
$AAPT2 link \
    -o $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk \
    --manifest $PROJ/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml \
    -I $FW \
    --java $PROJ/build/manual/gen \
    --min-sdk-version 28 \
    --target-sdk-version 34 \
    $RES_FLATS

echo "=== 3. Compile Java ==="
rm -rf $PROJ/build/manual/obj
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/obj
JAVA_FILES=$(find $PROJ/app/src/main/java -name "*.java")
GEN_FILES=$(find $PROJ/build/manual/gen -name "*.java" 2>/dev/null)

javac -source 17 -target 17 \
    -cp "$FW:$GSON" \
    -d $PROJ/build/manual/obj \
    $JAVA_FILES $GEN_FILES 2>&1

echo "=== 4. Dex ==="
rm -rf $PROJ/build/manual/dex
mkdir -p $PROJ/build/manual/dex

# List all class files + jars for d8
DEX_INPUTS=$(find $PROJ/build/manual/obj -name "*.class" | tr '\n' ' ')

java -cp $SDK/build-tools/34.0.0/lib/d8.jar com.android.tools.r8.D8 \
    --output $PROJ/build/manual/dex \
    --lib $FW \
    --classpath $GSON \
    --min-api 28 \
    $DEX_INPUTS $GSON 2>&1

echo "=== 5. Build APK ==="
cp $PROJ/build/manual/base.apk $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk
cd $PROJ/build/manual
zip -j unsigned.apk dex/classes.dex
cd $PROJ

echo "=== 6. Sign ==="
KEYSTORE=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/.android/debug.keystore
if [ ! -f "$KEYSTORE" ]; then
    echo "Creating debug keystore..."
    keytool -genkey -v -keystore $KEYSTORE \
        -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android \
        -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 \
        -dname "CN=Android Debug,O=Android,C=US" 2>/dev/null
fi

java -jar $SDK/build-tools/34.0.0/lib/apksigner.jar sign \
    --ks $KEYSTORE \
    --ks-pass pass:android \
    --key-pass pass:android \
    --out $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk \
    $PROJ/build/manual/unsigned.apk

echo "=== DONE ==="
ls -la $PROJ/build/manual/youtube-player.apk

## Yang masih perlu:
- Backend (`yt_backend.py`) harus running di Termux background

Wajar bro. 123KB kecil karena:

## Kenapa kecil:

```
APK NORMAL (10-50MB)         APK KITA (123KB)
├─────────────────────┐     ├──────────────────┐
│ App code (dex)      │ 5MB │ App code (dex)    │ ~15KB
│ Resources (img/xml) │ 2MB │ Resources (xml)   │ ~5KB
│ Native libs (.so)   │ 5MB │ —                 │ ❌ gak ada
│ AppCompat/Material  │ 3MB │ —                 │ ❌ gak ada
│ Gson library        │ 1MB │ Gson              │ ~50KB
│ Assets/fonts        │ 2MB │ —                 │ ❌ gak ada
│ Webview engine      │ ❌  │ —                 │ ❌ gak ada
└─────────────────────┘     └──────────────────┘
```

**Alasan:**
1. **Gak pakai WebView** → hilang ~5-10MB engine
2. **Gak pakai AppCompat/Material** → pakai `android.app.Activity` native, hemat ~3MB
3. **Gak ada native .so libs** → gak pakai ExoPlayer/codec bundled
4. **Gak ada gambar/foto** → thumbnail load via HTTP runtime, gak bundled
5. **Resources cuma XML** → gak ada PNG/asset besar
6. **Gson** satu-satunya dependency eksternal (~50KB)

APK 123KB = **pure code + XML layouts**. Itu tandanya efisien, bukan error.

APKTube/NewPipe punya 20MB+ karena bundle ExoPlayer (.so codec), icon packs, translation strings, dan Material Design libs.

Kita pakai `VideoView` native Android → codec sudah ada di system, gak perlu bundled. Makanya kecil.

Install aja, jalan kok. Test: start `python3 yt_backend.py` dulu, baru buka APK-nya.


**Syarat cuma 1:** Termux + yt-dlp terinstall (buat python binary + yt-dlp library). Tapi user gak perlu buka Termux, APK start backend sendiri.

Install APK-nya. Buka. Tunggu 5-15 detik (auto-start backend). Trending + search langsung jalan. Test ya!

Bisa banget! Balik ke WebView tapi di-balut APK rapi. 1 app, no Termux, no backend.

Sebelumnya WebView lo bilang "masih webview" karena UI-nya emang tampil kayak browser YouTube. Tapi sebenarnya itu udah 1 app standalone.

Pilihan lo sekarang:

```
OPSI A: WebView + Adblock (yg sebelumnya berhasil)
├─ 1 APK, no Termux
├─ Tampil kayak YouTube mobile tapi tanpa iklan
├─ Ad-block JS inject otomatis
├─ Skip ad otomatis
└─ Gak perlu python/yt-dlp sama sekali

OPSI B: WebView embed + custom chrome (lebih native feel)
├─ 1 APK, no Termux  
├─ Pakai Custom Tabs / WebChromeClient
├─ Fullscreen video support
├─ Ad-block tetap jalan
└─ Tab bottom nav native (Home/Search/Library)

OPSI C: Hybrid (yg paling keren)
├─ 1 APK, no Termux
├─ Search pakai YouTube search page di WebView
├─ Bottom nav native Android
├─ Ad-block + auto-skip
├─ Mini player bar native
└─ Download button native (share ke yt-dlp app kalo ada)
```

Lo mau yang mana? Gue saranin **OPSI A** — paling simple, udah pernah jalan, tinggal balikin code lama + cleanup. Mau gue balikin ke WebView version?
